name: Yarriambiack Creek Fauna Park & Picnic Area

tags.description: Publicly accessible dual-hotplate electric barbecue facility.
BBQ must be booked through F&S
Associated with covered picnic tables and benches
free for public use, clean up after yourself and it will stay that way.
Single plate BBQ, with stainless steel sink and tap beside.

Two, free to use, electric BBQs.

Be prepared to clean before and after use.
covered electric barbecue with tables and bench seating
